title: Shadows of Brimstone Giveaway #2 - Akaname Tongue Demon Enemy Expansion
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ul9Sw7brukY

Daniel (@dungeondive) announces the second Shadows of Brimstone giveaway during the deep dive series: a non-retail Akaname Tongue Demon enemy expansion. Like the previous giveaway, this one is open to Patreon supporters at the $5/month Treasure Chamber level. Entrants simply leave a comment on the dedicated Patreon post. The contest runs through Monday, March 8th, with the winner announced on Tuesday the 9th. Daniel mentions that one more giveaway remains in the series—a Deluxe Enemy expansion for the Ninja Clan—before the Brimstone deep dive wraps up.

----

The Akaname Tongue Demons are one of the more unsettling Forbidden Fortress enemies. Would you field them or flee from them?
